节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides interfaces to control the power of display.
Sets the screen brightness. value parameter must be of type number. 2. Incorrect parameter types;
注释信息: @param { number } value Brightness value, ranging from 0 to 255.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@throws { BusinessError } 4700101 - Failed to connect to the service.

error_codes.description: Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
Failed to connect to the service.

节点.功能描述: Sets the screen brightness. value parameter must be of type number. You are advised to set this parameter to true during the continuous adjustment and to false at the end of the continuous adjustment for better performance. continuous parameter must be of type boolean. 2. Incorrect parameter types;
注释信息: @param { number } value - Brightness value, ranging from 0 to 255.
@param { boolean } continuous - This parameter is used in the scenario of continuous adjustment to the brightness.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@throws { BusinessError } 4700101 - Failed to connect to the service.

parameters.说明: This parameter is used in the scenario of continuous adjustment to the brightness.

error_codes.description: Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
Failed to connect to the service.
